        What are people saying about dentists in Los Angeles, CA?

        This is a review for dentists in Los Angeles, CA:

        "It's been awhile since I've reviewed my favorite dental office. Dr. Farr is the most compassionate and caring dental professional. Her bedside manner and attention to detail makes her the best! I drive all the way from San Diego to make it to my dental appointments. Both hygienists, Miranda and Elvira are very professional and give amazing cleanings and Audrey in the front is always so welcoming and on top of scheduling my appointments. The entire team is 10/10. Highly recommend this office!"
